ValidationRule.description: Tier-2 (F7): rejects malformed emails on upsert. Seed-safe.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Email)), OR( NOT(CONTAINS(Email, "@")), NOT(CONTAINS(RIGHT(Email, LEN(Email) - FIND("@", Email)), ".")), CONTAINS(Email, " "), CONTAINS(Email, ".."), CONTAINS(Email, "@@") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Email address is not in a valid format. Cleanse the source email before migrating (check for a missing @, missing domain dot, spaces, or double dots).
